subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is a handmaiden who hath believed in Thee and in Thy signs, and hath entered upon the sacred couch [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی ان هذه امه التی آمنت بک و بایاتک و دخلت علی فراش القدس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for women
